title: qwerter
description: The mod adds new types of armor, tools, a new dimension, and structures.
body:
🌑 Qweter

Qweter is a dark adventure expansion that adds a brand new dimension — The Dark.

A world without sun.
A world without warmth.
A world that watches.

🌌 New Dimension — The Dark

The Dark is a twisted reflection of the Overworld:

Dense fog

Extremely low light levels

Increased hostile mob spawns

A constant feeling of isolation

Even familiar biomes feel different here…
And deeper below, something waits.

🌲 New Wood Type — Darkest Tree

Unique dark wood set

Cannot be grown from saplings

Generates naturally only in The Dark

This makes its resources rare and valuable.

💎 New Ore — Dark Crystal Ore

A rare ore that generates exclusively in The Dark.

It can be used to craft:

⚔ Weapons

🛡 Armor

🧰 Tools

🧱 Decorative blocks

🛡 Dark Crystal Gear

Dark Crystal equipment is:

Stronger than most standard materials

Designed to survive the harsh environment of The Dark

But this is not its final form.

🔥 Upgrade to Dark Netherite

Using:

🔩 A Netherite Ingot

🏺 A Smithing Template

You can upgrade Dark Crystal gear into Dark Netherite — an even more powerful tier of equipment.

🏛 New Structures

Across The Dark and the Overworld, you may encounter:

Mysterious portal structures

Ruined shrines

Hidden loot locations

Each structure enhances the mystery and abandoned atmosphere of the mod.
